scripts.dev:kill: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=@(3001,5173,5174); $pids=@(); foreach($p in $ports){ try{ $pids += (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess) } catch {} }; $pids = $pids | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach($procId in $pids){ try{ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; if($pids.Count -gt 0){ Write-Host ('Killed PIDs: ' + ($pids -join ',')) } else { Write-Host 'No dev ports to kill.' }"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:kill && concurrently -n s,w "npm run server" "npm run dev:web"
